subject: Subtomogram reconstruction bin4>bin2
body:
Hello Everyone, 

 

I’ve reconstructed bin4 subtomograms with no issues and have taken these 
into relion. When I try to reconstruct the refined subtomograms at bin2, 
warp doesn’t write any subvolumes to the subtomo directory. I’ve checked 
the input star file(s) and the format is consistent with previous star 
files I’ve used that have worked. I’m also using near-identical inputs to 
previous datasets that have worked. When I’m prompted to save the scaled 
subvolumes to the output star file, warp returns me to the overview tab 
without crashing. It also doesn’t save the output star file.

 

Any suggestions on what I could check or change to troubleshoot this would 
be much appreciated.

 

Many thanks,

Josh
